mainEntity.name: What if machine accident happens on day 179 of employment in Riverton?
mainEntity.text: What if machine accident happens on day 179 of employment in Riverton?

acceptedAnswer.text: New hires covered immediately if employer has comp insurance; report within 180 days regardless of tenure.[2][4]

suggestedAnswer.text: Utah requires coverage for all employees post-first day. Probationary status irrelevant. Insurers scrutinize new workers—prove accident details. Riverton cases need quick reporting.[2]

name: Coverage for New Employees in Machine Accidents
description: New hires covered immediately if employer has comp insurance; report within 180 days regardless of tenure.[2][4]
